title: Soak Test - Headset disconnected, app in the background, phone idle
scenario: App remains stable and responsive after prolonged idle with headset disconnected on Poly Studio Mobile
steps: 1. Install and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Pair a Poly Bluetooth headset with the app.
4. Verify the app Home screen shows the headset as "Disconnected".
5. Put the app in the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
6. Leave the phone idle for several hours.
7. After several hours, bring the Poly Studio Mobile app back to the foreground.
8. Check that the app is still running and responsive (e.g., UI responds to taps, no crash or freeze).
expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app remains stable and responsive after prolonged idle time in the background. No memory leaks, crashes, or freezes occur.
